requirement_topic.en: Networked Charger EMC, Radio and OCPP Interoperability
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩电磁兼容、无线电及OCPP互操作
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁電磁相容、無線電及OCPP互操作

summary.en: Networked EV chargers for the Marshall Islands should be documented for EMC, radio, and back-office interoperability. Electronic equipment may need FCC Part 15-style EMC evidence, and chargers with cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, or other radio modules should confirm Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities spectrum, type-approval, or import requirements. For public or fleet charging, OCPP interoperability is the practical back-office protocol baseline for monitoring, billing, access control, diagnostics, and load management, even where a Marshall Islands-specific national EV charging platform is not yet mature.
summary.zh: 面向马绍尔群岛的联网电动汽车充电桩应准备电磁兼容、无线电和后台互操作文件。电子设备可能需要FCC Part 15方向的电磁兼容证据；带蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID或其他无线模块的充电桩应确认马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局频谱、型式批准或进口要求。对于公共或车队充电，OCPP是监控、计费、访问控制、诊断和负载管理的实务后台协议基线，即使马绍尔群岛全国性电动汽车充电平台尚未成熟。
summary.zht: 面向馬紹爾群島的聯網電動汽車充電樁應準備電磁相容、無線電和後台互操作文件。電子設備可能需要FCC Part 15方向的電磁相容證據；帶蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID或其他無線模組的充電樁應確認馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局頻譜、型式批准或進口要求。對於公共或車隊充電，OCPP是監控、計費、訪問控制、診斷和負載管理的實務後台協議基線，即使馬紹爾群島全國性電動汽車充電平台尚未成熟。

standards_or_laws: FCC Part 15 — radio-frequency devices and unintentional radiators where used as Americas-market EMC evidence
IEC 61000 series — EMC immunity, emissions, harmonics, and power-quality reference
Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities spectrum management, type-approval, and telecommunications requirements where radio modules are included
OCPP — back-office communication for networked chargers

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. China-market network chargers may use operator-specific cloud protocols. These do not prove OCPP interoperability, FCC Part 15-style EMC compliance, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities radio acceptance, or 60 Hz site power-quality performance.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常在非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间采用GB/T 27930-2023。中国市场联网充电桩可能使用运营商专有云协议。这些证据不能证明OCPP互操作、FCC Part 15方向电磁兼容、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局无线电接受或60 Hz现场电能质量表现。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常在非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間採用GB/T 27930-2023。中國市場聯網充電樁可能使用運營商專有雲協議。這些證據不能證明OCPP互操作、FCC Part 15方向電磁相容、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局無線電接受或60 Hz現場電能質量表現。

standards_or_laws: China EMC test evidence for domestic market access

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version required by the operator, complete back-office integration testing, provide EMC reports suitable for a 120/240 V 60 Hz environment, verify wireless module authorisation with Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, and document cybersecurity, remote diagnostics, billing data, and load-management behavior. GB/T 27930 communication or a China-only cloud platform does not make a charger ready for Marshall Islands public or fleet networks.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认运营商要求的OCPP版本，完成后台集成测试，提供适用于120/240 V 60 Hz环境的电磁兼容报告，向马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局核实无线模块授权，并记录网络安全、远程诊断、计费数据和负载管理行为。GB/T 27930通信或仅适用于中国的云平台并不能使充电桩适用于马绍尔群岛公共或车队网络。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認運營商要求的OCPP版本，完成後台集成測試，提供適用於120/240 V 60 Hz環境的電磁相容報告，向馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局核實無線模組授權，並記錄網絡安全、遠程診斷、計費數據和負載管理行為。GB/T 27930通訊或僅適用於中國的雲平台並不能使充電樁適用於馬紹爾群島公共或車隊網絡。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC and radio requirements apply where electronic or wireless functions are included; OCPP is project-critical for public, fleet, or networked chargers where required by the CPO, owner, or tender
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 applies to China domestic DC charging communication and is not OCPP back-office interoperability or Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities radio evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Marshall Islands networked chargers need EMC, radio, and back-office evidence, not only GB/T charger-to-vehicle communication. Confirm FCC Part 15-style EMC data, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities wireless requirements, OCPP integration, and 60 Hz power-quality behavior before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马绍尔群岛联网充电桩需要电磁兼容、无线电和后台证据，而不仅是GB/T车桩通信。发货前应确认FCC Part 15方向电磁兼容数据、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局无线要求、OCPP集成和60 Hz电能质量行为。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬紹爾群島聯網充電樁需要電磁相容、無線電和後台證據，而不僅是GB/T車樁通訊。發貨前應確認FCC Part 15方向電磁相容數據、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局無線要求、OCPP集成和60 Hz電能質量行為。
